bullets: Christians in Indonesia whose Sunday worship was forcibly halted by extremists and whose freedom to gather remains under threat.
Thousands of Christian congregations in Malaysia facing loss of their only available worship spaces through new zoning restrictions barring non-Muslim gatherings in commercial areas.
Christians in Sri Lanka whose prayer meeting was interrupted by a stone attack that damaged their building, amid ongoing religious hostility.
Imprisoned house church leaders in China denied access to Bibles following a raid, and their families facing intimidation and uncertainty.
Montagnard Christian ethnic minority believers in Vietnam arrested on fabricated separatism charges for refusing state-controlled religious affiliation, and their wider persecuted community.

Christian communities across India facing mob violence at a burial site, disruption of a peaceful convention by nationalist groups, and displaced pastors facing unjust sacrilege charges under expanding legislation.
Twa Christian survivors in eastern DR Congo mourning at least seven killed in a brutal overnight attack, with a kidnapped priest still in captivity.
Christian farming families in Nigeria's Middle Belt region bereaved and wounded after eight were killed and fifteen injured in an armed assault following evening worship.
Civilians in Ukraine, including children, killed and injured in mass Russian missile and drone strikes on residential buildings, hospitals, and energy infrastructure across multiple cities
Millions of people in Lebanon amid ongoing airstrikes on civilian areas, a damaged hospital, mass displacement, and a fragile and repeatedly violated ceasefire
Families in Gaza living in constant fear along military-controlled zones, enduring ongoing bombardment and worsening humanitarian conditions
Civilians across Gulf states, including Kuwait, caught in escalating military exchanges between Iran and the United States involving missiles, drones, and strikes on infrastructure
Iranian civilians facing severe water shortages after strikes on desalination plants and pipelines compound years of drought and infrastructure strain
Opposition members, civil society figures, and vulnerable communities in Tunisia facing life sentences and prolonged imprisonment amid disputed political charges
Migrant farm workers in Italy, including survivors of a deadly arson attack that killed four people inside a minivan
Two British nationals detained in Iran, denied due process, and currently on hunger strike while awaiting Supreme Court review of a contested espionage conviction
Over one million Rohingya refugees in Bangladesh facing collapse of food, shelter, and healthcare as international aid funding runs dangerously low
Sudanese refugee women in the Central African Republic who fled Darfur on foot, now facing life-threatening childbirth conditions amid overwhelmed clinics and funding cuts
Civilians and opposition members in Mozambique amid politically motivated killings and ongoing violence following a disputed election
Mozambican and other foreign nationals in South Africa facing xenophobic violence, displacement, and destruction of their homes and livelihoods
Christian farming communities and Muslim herders in Nigeria's Middle Belt amid deepening religious tensions and deadly clashes driven by drought and displacement
Kenyan families amid rising killings of women, disappearances of children, and community protests demanding government action on gender-based violence
Kenyan protesters and communities divided over a proposed foreign Ebola quarantine facility, with at least two people killed during demonstrations
Civilians in Burkina Faso and across the Sahel living under military rule, facing poverty, jihadist violence, and the suppression of democratic expression
Displaced and economically struggling families in Lebanon relying on community food networks for access to basic supplies amid conflict and economic collapse
Six family members killed in a domestic shooting in Iowa, leaving a community in grief
Ultra-Orthodox Jewish men in Israel caught between deeply held religious convictions and new military conscription laws amid street confrontations with police
Chileans who depend on public healthcare and education amid protests over government spending cuts and clashes between demonstrators and police
Residents of France injured or killed in violent unrest following a major football celebration, with hundreds arrested and one person dead

Communities in DR Congo and neighboring Uganda facing a rapidly spreading Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak with nearly 250 deaths, over 1,000 suspected cases, no approved vaccine, and limited healthcare access in conflict-affected areas.
Residents across Kenya amid deadly unrest and loss of life during protests over Ebola containment plans, with grief and fear affecting communities.
Health authorities and patients in Brazil monitoring possible Ebola cases that could mark the outbreak's first spread beyond Africa.
Over one million people across Japan who endured Tropical Storm Jangmi, facing property damage, disruption, and recovery needs.
Residents across Hawaii and Colorado in the United States recovering from a moderate earthquake and a damaging large-hail storm causing widespread disruption and property damage.
Two men still trapped deep inside a flooded, narrow cave system in Laos with rescuers working to reach them safely.
Communities in Chile near a densely populated coastal region shaken by a magnitude 6 shallow earthquake, with residents assessing damage and safety.
Residents across southern Italy following a strong deep earthquake felt widely across the region, with communities checking for harm and damage.
